text.title: WCAG 2.2 Compliance Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the report artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid and one invalid example, and a closed list of forbidden patterns the validator must reject.

list.pattern: Auth flow with no no-cog alternate.
Target size < 24×24 CSS px without exception clause.
Focus indicator entirely hidden by sticky header.
Redundant entry in a session without security justification.

example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched.
verdict 'kinda' not in enum; missing artefact_id, version, last_reviewed, owner, scope.
